descEs: Errores predecibles que destruyen la cadencia y la confianza. Conocerlos de antemano ahorra semanas de frustracion.
descEn: Predictable errors that destroy cadence and trust. Knowing them in advance saves weeks of frustration.

genericAntiPatterns.symptomEs: El output tiene datos especificos que nunca proporcionaste. La IA invento nombres, fechas o metricas.
genericAntiPatterns.symptomEn: The output has specific data you never provided. The AI invented names, dates, or metrics.

steps.stepEs: Reune 3 piezas de evidencia real antes de abrir el flujo
steps.stepEn: Gather 3 pieces of real evidence before opening the flow

steps.stepEs: Sin documento al lado, no ejecutes — la IA amplifica lo que le das
steps.stepEn: Without a document beside you, don't execute — AI amplifies what you give it

steps.stepEs: Verifica cada dato del output contra tu input original
steps.stepEn: Verify each output data point against your original input

genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEs: Tu input determina la calidad del output. Garbage in, garbage out.
genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEn: Your input determines output quality. Garbage in, garbage out.

genericAntiPatterns.symptomEs: Manana lo hago — y pasan 3 dias sin ejecutar el flujo. La memoria fresca se pierde.
genericAntiPatterns.symptomEn: I'll do it tomorrow — and 3 days pass without executing the flow. Fresh memory is lost.

steps.stepEs: Bloquea tiempo inmediatamente post-trigger en calendario
steps.stepEn: Block time immediately post-trigger on calendar

steps.stepEs: Si no esta agendado, no existe — trata el flujo como una reunion
steps.stepEn: If it's not scheduled, it doesn't exist — treat the flow as a meeting

steps.stepEs: Vincula el trigger al evento: post-reunion = LaVuelta, viernes = ElRepo
steps.stepEn: Link the trigger to the event: post-meeting = LaVuelta, Friday = ElRepo

genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEs: El flujo tiene un trigger temporal. Si no lo anclas al calendario, la inercia gana.
genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEn: The flow has a time trigger. If you don't anchor it to the calendar, inertia wins.

genericAntiPatterns.symptomEs: El artefacto esta listo pero sigue en el clipboard o en una pestana abierta. Nadie mas lo vio.
genericAntiPatterns.symptomEn: The artifact is ready but still in the clipboard or an open tab. Nobody else saw it.

steps.stepEs: Define destino ANTES de ejecutar: Confluence, Jira, correo, Drive
steps.stepEn: Define destination BEFORE executing: Confluence, Jira, email, Drive

steps.stepEs: El flujo termina cuando esta publicado, no cuando la herramienta lo genera
steps.stepEn: The flow ends when it's published, not when the tool generates it

steps.stepEs: Notifica al destinatario — publicar sin avisar es lo mismo que no publicar
steps.stepEn: Notify the recipient — publishing without alerting is the same as not publishing

genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEs: Un artefacto sin destinatario no tiene impacto. Publicar = completar.
genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEn: An artifact without a recipient has no impact. Publishing = completing.

genericAntiPatterns.symptomEs: 45 minutos editando formato y estilo del output en lugar de mejorar el prompt para la proxima vez.
genericAntiPatterns.symptomEn: 45 minutes editing the output's format and style instead of improving the prompt for next time.

steps.stepEs: Timer de 5 min para revision. Si cumple suficientemente bueno, distribuye
steps.stepEn: 5-min timer for review. If it meets good enough, distribute

steps.stepEs: Mejora el prompt para la proxima ejecucion, no el output de esta vez
steps.stepEn: Improve the prompt for next execution, not this time's output

steps.stepEs: La cadencia importa mas que la perfeccion — 4 outputs buenos > 1 output perfecto
steps.stepEn: Cadence matters more than perfection — 4 good outputs > 1 perfect output

genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEs: Editar el output es trabajo lineal. Mejorar el prompt es trabajo exponencial.
genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEn: Editing the output is linear work. Improving the prompt is exponential work.

genericAntiPatterns.symptomEs: El output de la herramienta va directo al canal o correo sin abrir el documento completo.
genericAntiPatterns.symptomEn: Tool output goes straight to channel or email without opening the full document.

steps.stepEs: Regla 3x3: verifica 3 datos contra fuente original
steps.stepEn: 3x3 rule: verify 3 data points against original source

steps.stepEs: Abre el documento completo — nunca envies desde el preview
steps.stepEn: Open the full document — never send from the preview

steps.stepEs: Prueba de la firma: firmarias esto con tu nombre? Si no, itera
steps.stepEn: Signature test: would you sign this with your name? If not, iterate

genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEs: Todo output que compartes lleva tu nombre, no el de la herramienta. Tu firmas, tu respondes.
genericAntiPatterns.accountabilityEn: Every output you share carries your name, not the tool's. You sign it, you own it.

garbageInCallout.titleEs: Garbage in, garbage out — la regla que no cambia con la IA
garbageInCallout.titleEn: Garbage in, garbage out — the rule that doesn't change with AI
garbageInCallout.bodyEs: Una herramienta de IA es un sistema de transformacion: convierte tu input en un output estructurado. Si el input es vago, incompleto o sin contexto — el output hereda ese problema. La IA amplifica lo que le das.
garbageInCallout.bodyEn: An AI tool is a transformation system: it converts your input into structured output. If the input is vague, incomplete or lacks context — the output inherits that problem. AI amplifies what you give it.

_composerNotes: These 5 anti-patterns are GENERIC and apply to any AI-native workflow playbook. The compose-manifest script should merge these with playbook-specific anti-patterns (up to 13 total per the schema). The _generate markers indicate fields that need LLM contextualization.
